## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.11.1

### ⌨️ Keypads
- Adds an SKP0A keypad-code router blueprint so one automation can map several submitted keypad codes to different Home Assistant actions.
- Adds `mode_button` and `submit_button` aliases to the `xsense_keypad_code` event payload while keeping the existing `safe_mode_aim` field.
- Ignores SKP0A safe-notice payloads that do not include an actual submitted keypad code.

### 📚 Documentation
- Adds import links and usage notes for both the single-code and router keypad blueprints.
